metadata.open_to_relocation: Within India for strong fit; remote-first globally
metadata.current_status: Recent Computer Science & Engineering graduate actively seeking remote AI/ML/Automation roles

professional_summary: AI/ML engineer and solo developer focused on production-grade agentic systems, automation workflows, and applied machine learning. Built a fully autonomous multi-agent job application ecosystem (CrewAI + Playwright + Postgres + ChromaDB) with hard LLM budget caps, as well as end-to-end ML projects in fraud detection and wildlife movement prediction. Comfortable owning architecture, data pipelines, and deployment for small, high-impact teams.
core_value_proposition: Design and implement end-to-end AI automation pipelines (discovery → scoring → apply → tracking) using modern LLMs and tools.
Build reliable ML systems with proper data prep, evaluation, explainability, and deployment hooks.
Operate like a full-stack AI engineer: backend Python, data/ML, LLM orchestration, infra (Docker, CI/CD), and light frontend/extension work.

ml_dl: Model evaluation (Precision, Recall, F1, ROC-AUC, PR curves)
ai_agents_llm: LLM routing & fallback chains across providers (xAI, Perplexity, Groq, Cerebras, SambaNova, Gemini)
RAG systems (ChromaDB, NVIDIA NIM nv-embedqa-e5-v5, Gemini embeddings)
LLM budget enforcement and cost-aware design
automation_scraping: REST APIs (RemoteOK, Himalayas, Remotive/Jooble style APIs)
cloud_devops: Basic CI/CD with tests and linting
soft_skills: Solo dev orchestration with multiple AI coding agents
Cross-functional thinking between business goals and technical design

education.degree: Bachelor of Engineering in Computer Science and Engineering
education.institution: GH Raisoni College of Engineering, Nagpur
highlights: Focused on AI, machine learning, and systems engineering.
Completed capstone/portfolio projects in fraud detection and wildlife movement prediction using deep learning.

experience.title: Data Science Intern
description_bullets: Automated churn analysis workflow integrating extraction preprocessing scoring and reporting using Python scripts reducing analysis time from 8 hours to 35 minutes with 96% accuracy.
Developed intelligent notification system with automated engagement triggers based on predictions, orchestrating 3,200+ retention campaigns monthly improving retention by 28% and generating savings.

projects.name: AI Job Automation Agent
projects.summary: Fully autonomous, multi-agent job application ecosystem that discovers, scores, and applies to ~300 remote roles per month across 10+ platforms under a strict $10/month LLM budget.
highlights: Designed 5-agent CrewAI architecture (Master, Scraper, Analyser, Apply, Tracker) with explicit LLM provider assignments and 2-level fallback chains for critical agents.
Implemented a RAG resume system with 15 tailored resume variants embedded in ChromaDB using NVIDIA NIM, with Gemini as a fallback embedding provider.
Enforced hard xAI spend caps per run ($0.38) and monthly provider budgets ($5 xAI, $5 Perplexity) directly in code to guarantee a $10/month ceiling.
Integrated Playwright-based scraping and auto-apply flows for 10 primary platforms plus safety-net platforms (Nodesk, Toptal), and REST APIs for RemoteOK/Himalayas.
Logged all runs, applications, and decisions into Postgres and mirrored key states into Notion databases for manual review and tracking.

projects.name: Outreach Engine (n8n + Python)
projects.summary: Configurable end-to-end B2B outreach engine that ingests leads, enriches and scores them, syncs to Google Sheets/CRM, and drives automated personalized outreach via n8n.
highlights: Built modular pipeline with separate components for scraping, enrichment, validation/deduplication, scoring, and sheet/CRM sync.
Integrated enrichment APIs and local heuristics for contact and company data with caching, rate limiting, and retries.
Exported n8n workflows as JSON for version control and reproducible email campaigns.
Designed scoring and mapping configs so non-developers can tune outreach logic without code changes.

projects.name: Credit Card Fraud Detection
projects.summary: Production-oriented ML pipeline for credit card fraud detection on a highly imbalanced dataset (~0.17% fraud), featuring GAN-based augmentation and deployment hooks.
highlights: Implemented full pipeline from preprocessing and resampling (SMOTE, ADASYN, undersampling) to model training and evaluation.
Trained and compared Logistic Regression, Random Forest, XGBoost, and PyTorch neural networks, achieving ~0.99 F1 and near-perfect ROC-AUC with ensemble methods.
Built a PyTorch GAN module to generate synthetic fraud samples, improving robustness on rare-event patterns.
Added FastAPI/Streamlit endpoints and CI with pytest + flake8 + GitHub Actions to make the project deployment-ready.

projects.name: Wildlife Movement Prediction Using Deep Learning
projects.summary: GRU-based deep learning system that predicts wildlife migration trajectories from Movebank telemetry data, deployed via AWS S3 for interactive visualization.
highlights: Designed a GRU architecture for multi-step trajectory forecasting with temporal and geospatial features (lat/long, speed, temporal deltas).
Built a full time-series pipeline: data ingestion from Movebank, preprocessing, sequence creation, training, and evaluation (R², RMSE, spatial/temporal accuracy).
Deployed the notebook as an HTML experience on AWS S3, making results accessible to non-technical stakeholders.
Explored broader conservation-tech applications: corridor identification, climate impact analysis, and anti-poaching support.

work_setup.onsite: Only for exceptional roles in India

job_preferences.salary_expectation_note: Seek competitive, market-aligned compensation for junior AI/ML roles; open to discussing based on role scope, location, and equity.

form_answers.cover_letter_template: I am a Computer Science graduate from Nagpur, India with hands-on experience building production-grade AI systems. My flagship project is an autonomous multi-agent job application system using CrewAI, Playwright, and RAG that discovers and applies to jobs across 9 platforms — demonstrating real-world AI engineering skills at a production level. I am deeply passionate about building AI systems that work autonomously at scale, and I am excited about the opportunity to bring this energy to your team.
form_answers.why_this_company_template: I am drawn to this role because it sits at the intersection of AI engineering and real-world impact. My background in building autonomous AI agents, RAG pipelines, and LLM-integrated systems aligns directly with the work your team is doing. I am eager to contribute to a team that is pushing the boundaries of what AI can do in production.
form_answers.biggest_strength: I have a strong ability to architect and build complex AI systems end-to-end — from infrastructure and data pipelines to LLM integration and deployment. I learn quickly, work well with AI-assisted development workflows, and focus on shipping production-quality code.
form_answers.biggest_weakness: As a recent graduate, I have less formal industry experience than some candidates. I compensate by building real, complex projects independently and continuously upskilling through hands-on development.
form_answers.remote_work_experience: I have worked exclusively in remote and self-directed environments, managing complex multi-month projects independently with full accountability for architecture, development, and delivery.
form_answers.github_contribution_summary: My GitHub showcases production-grade AI engineering projects. My primary project is an autonomous multi-agent job application system (AIJobAutomationAgent) demonstrating expertise in CrewAI, Playwright, RAG, FastAPI, and Docker.
